analysis: Seven nights, all of them over six and a half hours, which honestly? That's a solid floor to be working from. Your REM has been the real highlight — you hit 2h34m on the second night and closed the stretch with 2h3m last night, and that kind of dreamy, brain-consolidating sleep is exactly what all those wind-down rituals are buying you. Deep sleep had a nice little surge midweek, with back-to-back nights of 53 and 49 minutes, even if it's been quieter on either side of that. The one thing worth noticing is that awake time crept up toward the end — 44 minutes on two nights and then 1h8m on the seventh — so whatever shifted there is worth watching, not stressing about, just watching.
